creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 195306
patch to update the port

- update 2.056 -> 2.058
Changes: https://metacpan.org/changes/distribution/IO-Socket-SSL
- "portlint -AC" gives non-relevant warns.
- testport of poudriere 3.2.99.20180601 runs ok at 11.2-release-amd64
	with pkg 1.10.99.7, perl 5.26.2 and with:
	1) ssl=base
	2) ssl=openssl
	3) ssl=openssl-devel
	4) ssl=libressl
- Build-in perl tests in a clean jail in all cases say: "PASS".
